zh.Buckden, Huntingdonshire, England: 英國亨廷格多史爾巴登
zh.Westminster, Middlesex, England: 英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特
zh.lifeSummary: John Treadway是Robert Treadway和Margaret Fisher的兒子，出生在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特。他和Isabell Hill至少有2個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1610年5月10日在英國戴文法林格頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Treadway是Robert Treadway和Margaret Fisher的儿子，出生在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特。他和Isabell Hill至少有2个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1610年5月10日在英国戴文法林格頓。

nameMeanings.name: Treadway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English treden ‘to tread, trample’ + wei(e) ‘way’, perhaps used for a vagrant or a well-traveled man.

variants.name: Tredway
meanings: English: variant of   Treadway  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: John Treadway was born in Westminster, Middlesex, England as the son of Robert Treadway and Margaret Fisher. He had at least 2 sons and 5 daughters with Isabell Hill. He died on 10 May 1610, in Farringdon, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: John Treadway est né à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, fils de Robert Treadway et Margaret Fisher. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles avec Isabell Hill. Il est décédé le 10 mai 1610, à Farringdon, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: John Treadway wurde in Westminster, Middlesex, England, als Sohn von Robert Treadway und Margaret Fisher geboren. Er hatte mit Isabell Hill mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Mai 1610 in Farringdon, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: John Treadway è nato il nel Westminster, Middlesex, England come figlio di Robert Treadway e Margaret Fisher. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie con Isabell Hill. Morì il 10 maggio 1610, nel Farringdon, Devon, England.

ja.Willoughby, Warwickshire, England: イギリスワーウィクシュアイアウィロウビー
ja.Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイア

ja.Westminster, Middlesex, England: イギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスター
ja.lifeSummary: John TreadwayはイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターでRobert TreadwayとMargaret Fisherの息子として生まれた。彼はIsabell Hillとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1610年5月10日にイギリスデボンファリングドンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Treadway(은)는 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 Robert Treadway(와)과 Margaret Fisher의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Isabell Hill(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1610년 5월 10일 영국 데폰 패링던에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Treadway nasceu em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra filho de Robert Treadway e Margaret Fisher. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas com Isabell Hill. Ele faleceu em 10 de maio de 1610, em Farringdon, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: John Treadway родился в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия. Его родителей звали Robert Treadway и Margaret Fisher. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей от Isabell Hill. Он умер 10 мая 1610 г. в местности фаррингдон, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: John Treadway nació en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra como hijo de Robert Treadway y Margaret Fisher. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas con Isabell Hill. Murió el 10 de mayo de 1610, en Farringdon, Devon, Inglaterra.
